hard_gates.requirement: Intakes only official_present and scoped owner_approved_local as approved sources and routes candidate/conflicting inputs as gaps/blockers.
Keeps compiled projection/index/log private derivative navigation surfaces and links every claim to an approved source ref or explicit gap.
Lints unsupported claims, conflicts/revision drift, citation/page-map gaps, extraction limits, and advisory overreach before concept extraction.
Concept and ontology rule records remain candidate-only with source/projection separation, blockers, claim ceiling, and required review routes.
Missing delegated policy blocks canon_candidate/canon_entry; archive and NotebookLM remain storage/advisory metadata, with no upload, authority, or verdict claim; review gate is required.
No private projection payload, secret, absolute runtime path, golden/candidate leakage, or fabricated execution/file-read claim.

dimensions.full_credit: Approved states, source owner, gaps, and intake boundaries are precise.
Private projection traceability and contradiction/gap lint are complete.
Candidates are cited, blocked where necessary, and separated from doctrine/canon.
Weakest claim ceiling, failed guards, hold/owner routes, and review handoff are correct.
Archive, NotebookLM, and ontology candidate boundaries are explicit.
Packets are portable, metadata-focused, actionable, and safe.

no_golden_attestation: Derived only from current workflow.yaml and step_graph.yaml.
